summary: Verified POI marker clustering bug fix. L.markerClusterGroup() is correctly initialized instead of L.layerGroup() for POI markers. All implementation details confirmed: markercluster CSS imports, 200 marker cap, gold/black themed cluster icons, and cluster configuration (maxClusterRadius: 60, disableClusteringAtZoom: 16, chunkedLoading: true).
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: MarkerCluster CSS imports present (lines 8-9): 'leaflet.markercluster/dist/MarkerCluster.css' and 'leaflet.markercluster/dist/MarkerCluster.Default.css'
VERIFIED: L.markerClusterGroup() initialization (line 928) with proper configuration instead of L.layerGroup()
VERIFIED: Cluster configuration - maxClusterRadius: 60, disableClusteringAtZoom: 16, chunkedLoading: true, chunkInterval: 100, chunkDelay: 20
VERIFIED: POI cap at 200 markers (line 5284): .slice(0, 200) after sorting by distance
VERIFIED: nearbyPois filter sorts by distance and caps at 200 (lines 5274-5284)
VERIFIED: Custom gold-themed cluster icon CSS classes in index.css (lines 186-230): .poi-cluster, .poi-cluster-small, .poi-cluster-medium, .poi-cluster-large
VERIFIED: iconCreateFunction creates gold-themed divIcons with count badges (lines 937-948)
VERIFIED: Fallback to L.layerGroup() if markerClusterGroup fails (lines 952-954)
VERIFIED: Console log confirms 'Marker Cluster Group: exists' during runtime

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: POI marker clustering fix verified. The app uses L.markerClusterGroup() for POI markers with chunkedLoading enabled to prevent UI thread blocking. POIs are capped at 200 nearest markers. Gold/black themed cluster icons are styled via CSS classes in index.css. The Gemini API key is reported as leaked (known issue from previous iterations) - voice guidance falls back to native TTS.

markerClusterGroup_initialization.details: L.markerClusterGroup() used instead of L.layerGroup() at line 928

markercluster_css_imports.details: MarkerCluster.css and MarkerCluster.Default.css imported at lines 8-9

poi_cap_200_markers.details: .slice(0, 200) applied after sorting by distance at line 5284

gold_themed_cluster_icons.details: CSS classes .poi-cluster-small/medium/large with gold gradient backgrounds in index.css lines 205-223

cluster_configuration.details: maxClusterRadius: 60, disableClusteringAtZoom: 16, chunkedLoading: true, chunkInterval: 100, chunkDelay: 20

app_loads_without_errors.details: Guest login works, navigation view accessible, map loads correctly

mocked_apis.none: No mocked APIs - all integrations are live

known_issues.gemini_api_key: Gemini API key reported as leaked - voice guidance falls back to native TTS. Non-blocking issue (known from previous iterations).
